idea-plugin.name: FeignHelper
idea-plugin.description:
FeignHelper

A modern navigation assistant for Spring Cloud OpenFeign, Spring MVC and the Spring 6 @HttpExchange declarative HTTP client, built on top of IntelliJ Platform 2.x in pure Kotlin.

Features

  • Bidirectional gutter navigation between @FeignClient / @HttpExchange interfaces and @RestController methods.
  • One-click path copy — right-click any gutter arrow to copy the resolved endpoint path.
  • Spring configuration aware — automatically resolves server.servlet.context-path, spring.mvc.servlet.path, application-{profile}.yml and ${var:default} placeholders.
  • Java & Kotlin sources, courtesy of UAST.
  • Project-level caching with incremental refresh on PSI and Spring configuration changes.
  • Bilingual UI — English & Simplified Chinese bundle.

Compatibility

IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3+ (build 243+). Requires the bundled Java and Kotlin plugins.

Links

  • Source on GitHub
  • Changelog
  • Report an issue

简介（中文）

FeignHelper 是面向 Spring Cloud OpenFeign、Spring MVC 与 Spring 6 @HttpExchange 声明式 HTTP 客户端的现代化导航助手，基于 IntelliJ Platform 2.x、Kotlin 编写。

  • @FeignClient / @HttpExchange 与 @RestController 双向行内导航
  • gutter 箭头右键复制解析后的接口路径到剪贴板
  • 自动解析 application.yml / application-{profile}.yml 与 ${var:default} 占位符
  • 同时支持 Java 与 Kotlin（基于 UAST）
  • 中英双语界面
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial public release.
  • Bidirectional gutter navigation between @FeignClient / @HttpExchange and @RestController.
  • Right-click gutter to copy the resolved endpoint path with balloon notification.
  • Java + Kotlin source support via UAST.
  • application-{profile}.yml resolution and ${var:default} placeholders.
  • Project-level caching with @Service(Service.Level.PROJECT); asynchronous warm-up through ProjectActivity.
  • English & Simplified Chinese bundle.
